learnings.evidence: Emails use: "Tony Hoare died (Quicksort inventor)", "84 commits (7 days)", "289.6K stars". Never generic "recent commits".
learnings.insight: Email design principles: specificity (names/numbers/attributions), grid layouts for metrics, cross-domain collision detection, night questions for subconscious processing. Pre-scraped intelligence + live WebSearch combined.

learnings.evidence: _meta/plans/ai-engineering-team.md + dream analysis
learnings.insight: Worktree parallelism dangerous on shared files: agents contaminate each other's working tree. Sequential execution safer when branches share files like tests/. Always commit/stash ALL pending work before creating worktrees.

learnings.evidence: dream-retrieval.md — Pragmatist-hardened design survived council. A5 load_count is the non-negotiable add over pure-minimalist (hit_count poisoned by read-start blanket bump otherwise).
learnings.insight: Retrieval fix split: ship recall dedup+visibility+recalibrate+load_count now (cascades safe); offer scope/recall --global/promote as opt-in tools; defer decontaminate --apply until --global proves the global brain earns the W8 risk

learnings.evidence: agentdb cmd_recall v7.15; verified on sqlite 3.43.2 scratch DBs
learnings.insight: bm25() cannot be used inside an aggregate or GROUP BY in SQLite FTS5 — the optimizer flattens the subquery and throws 'unable to use function bm25 in the requested context'. Dedup ranked FTS results in awk (post-query), not in SQL.

learnings.evidence: _meta/reports/retro-agentdbs.md, dream-retrieval.md
learnings.insight: AgentDB retrieval rot: per-project learning DBs were 73% identical clones (328/452 distinct insights in all 5 DBs), hit_count was poisoned by read-start blanket-bumping every row each session, and FTS existed in only 1 of 5 DBs. Fix shipped: dedup + visibility filter + recalibrated ranking + load_count split (v7.15). Deferred: scope column + cross-project recall --global (global brain empty, would ship dead).

learnings.evidence: fixed by matching test to disabled-hook intent + adding workflow_run red-CI auto-fix; commits dcf6faf/298ac54
learnings.insight: deliberate behavior change shipped via chore(session-end) auto-commit without updating its test → suite red on main for days; no CI-failure auto-fix trigger existed and the local test-gate cache (_meta/.test-status) was frozen PASS so red kept pushing

learnings.evidence: 2026-07-06: .claude/reference/README.md edit blocked; Aria ruled follow the hook, dir moved to _meta/reference
learnings.insight: kernel plugin guard-config blocks Write/Edit outside .claude allowlist (CLAUDE.md, rules/, commands/, agents/, skills/, hooks/, settings)

learnings.evidence: PR #143, feat/aggressive-promotion; motivated by I0.15 (hooks not honor-system)
learnings.insight: Promotion pathway shifted to artifact ladder: hook > agent > skill > CLAUDE.md prose. Retrospective scaffolds project-local artifacts in host .claude/ and audits project fit (missing + dormant).

learnings.evidence: dify-meta e63ce09, matra 7b66eb7, Vaults 93afd1a2, kernel f11895f, urban-atlas 0ba9e19
learnings.insight: Cross-repo retrospective promotion round: 4 repos mined, 10 artifacts shipped via artifact ladder. Strongest cross-repo failure class: green sub-computation / broken armed path (4 independent sightings) -> kernel testing+adversary+CLAUDE.md anti-pattern

learnings.evidence: urban-atlas feat/living-city-screen had an active c21 session; commit landed clean so accepted, not pushed
learnings.insight: Subagent committed despite explicit no-commit contract (urban-atlas 0ba9e19) into another live session's branch; likely that repo's auto-commit hooks. Writer-lane contracts need commit-suppression verified, not just stated

learnings.evidence: kernel v8 migration: 30+ test refs, validate-structure.sh, bump-version.sh, plugin.json, CLAUDE/AGENTS/README/QUICKSTART all pointed at commands/
learnings.insight: Migration cost lives in enforcement surfaces, not the moved files: 14 command files moved in one scripted minute; ~90% of the work was retargeting tests/hooks/docs/metadata that ENUMERATED the old layer

learnings.evidence: kernel-manifest validator caught it on its own first fixture (commit: 0000... -> int)
learnings.insight: YAML scalar typing: an all-digit git sha (or sha256) parses as an integer and fails string schema validation; manifests must quote every hash/commit field

learnings.evidence: verified against live docs fetch + this session's own skill listing; kernel v8 shipped alias-free
learnings.insight: Plugin skills preserve slash invocation exactly: skills/<dir>/SKILL.md in plugin 'kernel' surfaces as /kernel:<dir>, so a commands->skills migration needs NO aliases

learnings.evidence: kernel v8 PR 145: 3 CI-only failures after a fully green local suite; all three were environment/enumeration gaps, zero logic bugs
learnings.insight: CI workflow yml files duplicate repo checks inline (version-sync in test.yml mirrored run-tests.sh) and are an enumeration surface migrations miss: grep sweeps covering *.md/*.sh/*.json skip *.yml. Also: CI runners have no git identity (tests that commit in temp repos need inline -c user.email/-c user.name) and shellcheck runs in CI but not locally by default

learnings.evidence: verified 2026-07-10 tearitapart PR145
learnings.insight: kernel-manifest YAML parse chain: pyyaml absent on this machine so ruby psych is the LIVE parser; psych last-wins duplicate keys (mode: sealed shadowed by mode: advisory validates+parses as advisory). Parser is part of the protocol.

learnings.evidence: JSONL 2026-07-10 21:42 run; macOS crash reports at 21:30 show Playwright SIGABRT and chrome-headless-shell SIGTRAP with 48.0G Memory Tag 253; suite has no Playwright/Chrome invocation
learnings.insight: full suite reported 298/298 then shell exited 137 during concurrent Claude/browser resource pressure

learnings.evidence: 2026-07-10 kernel-claude crash forensics
learnings.insight: Treat exit 137 after a green Results line as external kill/resource pressure, not a test failure; inspect concurrent sessions and DiagnosticReports before rerunning

learnings.evidence: validate=READY review=APPROVE adversary=PASS local=324/324 ci=tests+shellcheck+schema+version all pass
learnings.insight: ship: feat/yaml-skill-unification 704f577..10200b2 pushed

learnings.evidence: KERNEL 7.23 hooks.json carried Claude-accepted top-level version that Codex 0.144.1 rejects before hooks run; JSON parse-only tests missed loader schema.
learnings.insight: Cross-loader plugin config needs schema and armed-path tests

learnings.evidence: validate=350/350 review=APPROVE ci=4/4 pr=152 release=published marketplace=installed live_codex_stop=pass
learnings.insight: ship: fix/codex-stop-hook-8.1.4 c5dfdca..05a852e merged as 61fa482 and tagged v8.1.4

memory_events.inference_method: weak: session-level QA outcome, not a per-memory observation
